blended.narrative: Wildcat Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: light rain showers, highs of 53°F.
Saturday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
